infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Skrift needs microphone access to record voice memos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Skrift captures your location when you save a voice memo for context.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Skrift reads your step count for contextual metadata.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Skrift lets you take a photo to attach to your voice memo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Skrift lets you attach a photo from your library to your voice memo.

plugins.microphonePermission: Skrift needs microphone access to record voice memos.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Skrift captures your location when you save a voice memo for context.

plugins.motionPermission: Skrift reads your step count for contextual metadata.

plugins.photosPermission: Skrift lets you attach a photo to your voice memo.
plugins.cameraPermission: Skrift lets you take a photo to attach to your voice memo.
Skrift needs camera access to scan the QR code for Mac pairing.
